title: Clean Mace
description: A Texture Pack that makes ur Mace Texture way more clean.
body:
![Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2a21ac25be134e70e53df73eea3ab2fc3e0116c.png)
**The Mace** gets turnded into a Mace in a **1080 x 1080 Resolution** with clean Outlines and Simpel Colors.

Much better than the normal mace!

Inspired from the Mace Icon from MC Tiers

Made from: **NatchoNerbo** [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@NatchoNerbo)
![Dropped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30b7f0402e796647f54f230bde4202c01a2ee22f.png)

![Hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3ff62fa925bc45fece6ae9c5b2cbd15876a32b4.png)
